members.label: fan
members.long_form_open_description: Dark-blade ceiling fan mounted on a high vaulted white ceiling with a small integrated light fixture; central in the room and visually suspended above the main seating area. Fan blades appear wooden/dark brown with a metal central housing.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: centered above the open carpeted floor between the two main seating banks
members.object_text_long: center sector | Dark-blade ceiling fan mounted on a high vaulted white ceiling with a small integrated light fixture; central in the room and visually suspended above the main seating area. Fan blades appear wooden/dark brown with a metal central housing.

members.label: fan
members.description: dark wood-blade ceiling fan with integrated light fixture
members.long_form_open_description: Five-blade ceiling fan in a dark wood or bronze finish with central dome light turned on, mounted on a vaulted white ceiling. Blades angled and darker than the ceiling; light casts warm glow on ceiling.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Suspended centrally above the main seating area and between the TV wall and the sliding glass door.
